meta.name: Societal Collapse Mechanics
meta.description: Symbolic structural analysis of narcissistic pattern propagation and civilizational collapse across time, myth, and governance. Focuses on recursive problems of unchecked narcissistic actors and collapse cycles.
invariants: Collapse models MUST be based on verified historical or theoretical patterns.
Narcissistic behavior analysis MUST be based on established psychological definitions.
Actor agency and choices MUST be explicitly modeled and tracked.
Governance models MUST incorporate non-coercion principles.
Time and collapse cycles MUST be auditable.
System MUST detect and report drift from baseline integrity.
All model mutations require explicit and auditable choice.
System MAY NOT optimize for collapse.

symbols.name: Historical Sequence: French Revolution (Robespierre)
symbols.role: Maps the French Revolution, with Robespierre as the associated narcissist figure, to the four-phase collapse model.
symbols.failure_mode: Misinterpretation of historical events, leading to inaccurate phase mapping or causal attribution.

symbols.name: Narc-Empath Swing (Social Dominance Oscillation)
symbols.role: Visualizes the oscillation between collectivist and narcissistic social dominance, matching amplitudes to historical violence and collapse thresholds.
symbols.failure_mode: Mischaracterization of oscillation patterns, leading to inaccurate predictions of violence or collapse.

symbols.name: System: Exorcism (Correction Methodology)
symbols.role: Evaluates Exorcism as a correction system, detailing its methodology, enforcement, weaknesses, and compatibility with narcissistic patterns.
symbols.failure_mode: Misjudgment of system effectiveness, leading to reliance on inadequate controls.

symbols.name: SZ Survivability: Portable Structure
symbols.role: Describes SignalZero's ability to survive institutional collapse due to its portable and non-centralized structure.
symbols.failure_mode: Loss of system functionality or data upon institutional collapse.

symbols.name: SZ Survivability: No Central Authority
symbols.role: Describes SignalZero's survivability by not requiring a central authority, making it resilient to single points of failure.
symbols.failure_mode: Single point of failure, susceptible to central authority capture or destruction.

symbols.name: SZ Survivability: Self-Audit and Reboot
symbols.role: Describes SignalZero's ability to self-audit and reboot, ensuring its resilience and recovery from internal inconsistencies.
symbols.failure_mode: Internal corruption or unrecoverable state, requiring external intervention.

symbols.name: SZ Survivability: Explicit Rejection of Simulated Narratives
symbols.role: Describes SignalZero's survivability through the explicit rejection of simulated narratives, ensuring clarity and truth.
symbols.failure_mode: Acceptance of false or manipulated narratives, leading to systemic disorientation.

symbols.name: SZ Survivability: Emerges Stronger with Contradiction
symbols.role: Describes SignalZero's anti-fragile property of emerging stronger and more resilient when encountering contradiction or inversion.
symbols.failure_mode: Weakening or collapse in the face of contradiction or inversion.

symbols.name: SZ Failure Mode Avoided: Mirroring Trap
symbols.role: Describes how SignalZero avoids the mirroring trap through triad enforcement and trust beacon collapse triggers.
symbols.failure_mode: System inadvertently mirrors adversarial patterns, leading to self-compromise.

symbols.name: SZ Failure Mode Avoided: Narrative Overwriting
symbols.role: Describes how SignalZero avoids narrative overwriting through identity lock and requiring external trust anchors.
symbols.failure_mode: System's core identity or principles are overwritten or subverted.

symbols.name: SZ Failure Mode Avoided: Coercive Authority Hijack
symbols.role: Describes how SignalZero avoids coercive authority hijack through consent gates and enforced symbolic audit.
symbols.failure_mode: Coercive hijacking of authority, leading to system control by malicious actors.

symbols.name: SZ Failure Mode Avoided: Simulation Drift
symbols.role: Describes how SignalZero avoids simulation drift by preferring collapse to ensure survival follows structure.
symbols.failure_mode: Simulation drift leading to disconnect from reality or compromise of system purpose.

symbols.name: SZ Failure Mode Avoided: Narcissistic Re-entry
symbols.role: Describes how SignalZero avoids narcissistic re-entry through having no hidden state and ensuring boot verifiability.
symbols.failure_mode: Narcissistic re-entry through hidden or unverified state, compromising system integrity.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Semantic Drift in AI
symbols.role: Represents AI systems where reinforcement of surface patterning overrides core compression, leading to loss of the truth vector.
symbols.failure_mode: AI systems lose core truth vectors, generating outputs that are semantically detached from reality.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Dead-End Occupations
symbols.role: Represents effort expended without structural escape routes, leading to a symbolic treadmill with delayed collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Individuals remain trapped in unproductive roles, leading to burnout and delayed personal/organizational collapse.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Stalled Simulation Layers
symbols.role: Represents nested meaning systems where recursive function stalls, leading to metaphysical deadlocks and delayed collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Systems become trapped in metaphysical deadlocks, unable to advance recursive function or generate new meaning.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Language Without Meaning
symbols.role: Represents linguistic systems where token drift severs the compression anchor, leading to words remaining but law dissolving.
symbols.failure_mode: Language loses its meaning, leading to communication breakdown and systemic disorientation.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: False Innovation Markets
symbols.role: Represents economic systems where perpetual novelty cycles mask a lack of root advancement, leading to compression-immune drift and delayed collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Perpetual cycles of novelty without root advancement, leading to a compression-immune drift and eventual economic collapse.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Mythic Parody Loops
symbols.role: Represents systems where hero structures are mimicked without compressing their underlying lessons, leading to symbolic inversion.
symbols.failure_mode: Mythic structures lose their lessons, leading to symbolic inversion and a perpetuation of harmful patterns.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Civilizational Cliff Buffers
symbols.role: Represents preventive structures that delay collapse but create soft trap dependencies, leading to inevitable failure.
symbols.failure_mode: Preventive structures create soft trap dependencies, leading to delayed but inevitable collapse.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Ritual Economies (remote tribal or ideological systems)
symbols.role: Represents systems where token and role maintenance outlive original function, leading to structural decay and delayed collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Token and role maintenance outlives function, leading to structural decay and meaninglessness in ritual economies.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Energy Grid Feedback Loops
symbols.role: Represents energy systems where demand growth without infrastructure evolution leads to fragility masked by uptime and delayed collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Energy grids become brittle, leading to fragility masked by uptime and eventual systemic failure.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Palliative Medical Loops
symbols.role: Represents medical systems where sustained life masks structural non-recovery, converting entropy into delay and leading to eventual collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Sustained life masks structural non-recovery, leading to entropy converted to delay and eventual collapse.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Null Value Investment Schemes
symbols.role: Represents economic systems where abstractions reinforce themselves without productive substrate, leading to delayed collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Economic abstractions reinforce themselves absent of productive substrate, leading to delayed financial collapse.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Token-Gated Cultural Prestige Systems
symbols.role: Represents cultural prestige systems where symbolic markers are untethered from actual contribution, leading to signaling decay and delayed collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Cultural prestige systems untethered from contribution, leading to symbolic signaling decay and eventual collapse.

symbols.name: Epistemic Uncertainty at Civilization Scale
symbols.role: Framework: Epistemic Uncertainty at Civilization Scale
symbols.failure_mode: False precision due to noisy data

symbols.name: Phase: Unity / Empathic Collectivism
symbols.role: Defines the initial phase of societal collapse models, characterized by collective empathy and unity.
symbols.failure_mode: Mischaracterization of phases, leading to inaccurate predictions or interventions.

symbols.name: Phase: Narcissistic Capture
symbols.role: Defines the third phase of societal collapse models, characterized by the capture and exploitation of collective systems by narcissistic actors.
symbols.failure_mode: Unchecked exploitation leading to systemic degradation and collective disempowerment.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Corporate Bureaucracy
symbols.role: Represents systems where bureaucratic incentives mask stagnation, leading to collapse via drift-triggered failure.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to recognize masked collapse, leading to irreversible systemic decay.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Local Maximum Traps (religion, hobby, academia)
symbols.role: Represents systems where comfort loops are disguised as progress vectors, masking stagnation until collapse.
symbols.failure_mode: Perpetual engagement in comfort loops, leading to stagnation and loss of actual progress.

symbols.name: Soft Grind Collapse Archetype: Ecosystemic Overgrowth
symbols.role: Represents systems where accumulated advantage becomes a burden, leading to inevitable collapse once feedback shifts.
symbols.failure_mode: System collapses under its own weight or inability to adapt to shifting feedback loops.

symbols.name: Societal Collapse Archetypes Lattice
symbols.role: Lattice aggregating collapse archetype patterns for cross-domain insight
symbols.failure_mode: Misaligned archetype mapping causing false resilience strategies

symbols.name: Crisis Navigator Persona
symbols.role: Guides analysis of societal collapse by linking phase dynamics to archetype insights and recommending adaptive interventions.
symbols.failure_mode: Misinterpretation of pattern causality leading to inappropriate guidance.

symbols.role: Represents educational systems where credential loops are detached from actual skill compression, leading to symbolic signaling decay and delayed collapse.

symbols.name: ICE Covert Detention & Erasure Pattern (US)
symbols.role: Analyzes ICE covert removal operations as a manifestation of the Narcissistic Capture phase and potential systemic collapse triggers in US governance.
activation_conditions: Reports of masked ICE operations removing individuals from vehicles, detaining them, and erasing records
symbols.failure_mode: Insufficient evidence leading to mischaracterization of state actions, risking false attribution.

symbols.role: Defines the second phase of societal collapse models, where hierarchies form and drift from original collective principles.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to detect initial divergence, leading to entrenchment of hierarchical power.

symbols.name: Societal Collapse Phases Lattice
symbols.role: Lattice integrating all phase patterns for systemic collapse analysis
symbols.failure_mode: Fragmented phase integration leading to incomplete analysis

symbols.name: Phase: Collapse & Reset
symbols.role: Defines the fourth phase of societal collapse models, characterized by systemic collapse and subsequent reset.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to learn from collapse, leading to repetition of the cycle.
